# Upward Development LLC
> Licensed & insured construction and land development company in Lake Charles, LA.

## Company Info
- Name: Upward Development LLC
- Phone: 318-452-7653
- Email: lucas@upwarddevelopment.us
- Location: 1650 E Gauthier Rd, Lake Charles, LA 70601
- Website: https://www.upwarddevelopment.us

## Services
- Dirt Work & Land Clearing: Land clearing, culvert installations, ponds, house pads, debris removal.
- Steel Buildings: Licensed and insured to build everything from chicken coops to shopping centers.
- Super Homes: Commercial strength with residential beauty — steel reinforced custom homes built to withstand the toughest storms.
- Real Estate Investments: Buying and investing in land and homes across Louisiana.
- Land Clearing: Residential lot clearing, underbrush removal, forestry mulching, stump grinding.

## About
Upward Development LLC is a family-owned construction firm founded in 2024, based in Lake Charles, Louisiana. Started by the LaCour family, what began in real estate and timber evolved into a full-scale construction company. The team prides itself on being "Louisiana Tough" and treats every property like their own. All work is pointed upward for the glory of God.
